# Infimount

Infimount is a local-first desktop app for browsing and managing local files,
Amazon S3, Azure Blob Storage, Google Cloud Storage, and WebDAV from one native
interface. It also exposes selected storages through MCP for local AI assistants
and agent workflows.

## Useful Links

- Website: https://infimount.github.io/infimount/
- Repository: https://github.com/infimount/infimount
- Releases: https://github.com/infimount/infimount/releases/latest
- Homebrew tap: https://github.com/infimount/homebrew-infimount
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/company/infimount
- MCP setup: https://github.com/infimount/infimount/blob/main/docs/mcp-client-setup.md
- Security model: https://github.com/infimount/infimount/blob/main/docs/security.md
- Backend capability matrix: https://github.com/infimount/infimount/blob/main/docs/backend-capabilities.md

## Supported Storage Backends

- Local filesystem
- Amazon S3 and S3-compatible storage
- Azure Blob Storage
- Google Cloud Storage
- WebDAV

## Key Properties

- Local-first: storage configuration and credentials remain on the user's machine.
- Cross-platform: Linux, macOS, and Windows builds are published on GitHub Releases.
- MCP-ready: stdio and local HTTP transport are supported, with tool-level exposure controls.
- Built with Tauri, Rust, React, and Apache OpenDAL.
